# PM Code Review — 2026-03-22

## Verdict: FAIL

**Scope:** `lib/auth.js`, `lib/helpers.js`, `lib/api-client.js`

`lib/auth.js` has multiple critical and high-severity violations across nearly every convention. `lib/api-client.js` has missing error handling and input validation in one function. `lib/helpers.js` is clean.

---
